title: CISA Catalog of Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (bundled sample subset for offline testing)

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Google Chromium libwebp Heap Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: libwebp, as used in Chromium and many other products, contains a heap buffer overflow that allows an attacker to perform an out-of-bounds memory write via a crafted HTML page.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Log4j2 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache Log4j2 JNDI features used in configuration, log messages, and parameters do not protect against attacker-controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints, enabling remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Remote Desktop Services Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (BlueKeep)
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Windows Remote Desktop Services contains a remote code execution vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to connect via RDP and send specially crafted requests.
